title: Cowhide Leather Travel Bag Duffle Handmade
description:
This handmade cowhide leather travel bag combines luxury design with practical functionality. Crafted from genuine cowhide leather, each bag features a unique natural pattern, making every piece one of a kind.

Designed in a structured duffle style, it is perfect for travel, weekend getaways, or everyday use. The durable leather handles and secure zipper closure ensure both comfort and reliability, while the timeless design adds a refined statement to any look.

Available in multiple sizes, making it ideal for boutiques offering versatile and high-quality travel accessories.

Each bag is carefully handcrafted, highlighting authentic craftsmanship and premium materials.

Features:

Genuine cowhide leather (unique natural patterns)
Structured duffle design
Durable leather handles
Secure zipper closure
Handmade artisan product

Sizes:

Small: 20 x 13 x 12 cm
Medium: 26 x 16 x 15 cm
Large: 45 x 25 x 25 cm
category: Bags & Purses → Travel Bags → Duffle Bags
